title: Planning Schema + Auto Assignment
summary: Added normalized planning completion schema aligned with SPEC/PROMPT governance
Enforced deterministic agent auto-assignment + auto-dispatch after planning completion
Removed missing PLANNING.md dependency by embedding source-of-truth planning rules in prompt
rollback_steps: Revert planning-schema helper and planning route updates

Add API tests for planning normalization and assignment fallback paths
